payload.claim_text: Figures are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. The current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Farebox revenue favorable driven by commutation ridership increase

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenues were $20.8 million favorable to the Budget due to an increase in commutation ridership across all East of Hudson lines.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Other Operating Revenue favorable driven by insurance reimbursements

payload.claim_text: Other Operating Revenues were $10.8 million favorable to the Budget, reflecting insurance recoveries for storm Ida combined with higher advertising, interest, and station revenues.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.claim_text: Variance reflects higher attrition than planned (A). Variance reflects delayed hiring of vacant positions (B). Budget adjustment to reflect realistic monthly growth of approximately 20 Full-Time Equivalents (C).
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

payload.gap_text: This report is based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. The current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
